name: Age Calculator
description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days from your birthdate.
formulaDescription: Calculates the difference between current date and birthdate.

example.explanation: As of March 15, 2026, someone born on 1990-01-01 is 34 years, 2 months, 14 days old.

faqs.question: How accurate is this?
faqs.answer: Calculates based on current date and provided birthdate.
